title: Stoney Clover Lane Revives Sold-Out Disney Princess Prints With New Bag Styles
author: Erin Lassner
fullText:
If you purchase an independently reviewed product or service through a link on our website, The Hollywood Reporter may receive an affiliate commission.

 Stoney Clover Lane announced the long-awaited return of its Disney Princess Collection, featuring a fresh run of collectible pieces plus a rerelease of previously sold-out product. Available to shop now on stoneycloverlane.com, the special-edition styles, yet again, began selling out within minutes of launch.

 In the 2026 drop, Stoney Clover Lane brings whimsical Disney-inspired patterns to a fresh assortment of its signature pouches, fanny packs, purses and bag charms. New additions include the Disney Princess Micro Pouch ($78), Disney Princess Bag Charm ($58), Disney Princess Jumbo Fanny Pack ($158, but sold out at time of publish) and Disney Princess Pouchette Crossbody Bag 02 ($178, but sold out at time of publish). The new styles join a rereleased selection of packing cubes, duffels, pouches and purses.

 

 Stoney Clover Lane Disney Princess Micro Pouch Eight prints available. 

 Stoney Clover Lane’s Disney Princess Micro Pouch is the collections smallest pouch to date. Like the rest of the collection, it features eight Disney princesses: Snow White, Cinderella, Jasmine, Rapunzel, Aurora, Ariel, Tiana and Belle. 

 Related: Disney and Starbucks Unveil New Tumblers Paired With Mystery Pin Packs

 See a few more in-stock favorites below, and shop the rest of the Disney Princess x Stoney Clover Lane capsule at stoneycloverlane.com while supplies last. Most pieces can be customized with monogramming and patches.

 Stoney Clover Lane Utility Tote Featured colorway: Dreams & Shooting Stars. 

 All eight Disney Princesses are pictured on the tote, which folds into itself for easy transportation. 

 Stoney Clover Lane Disney Princess Weekender Featured colorway: A Princess Dream. 

 The Disney Princess duffel bag features vegan leather details, an adjustable and removable solid nylon strap, metal feet for protection and gold hardware.

 

 Stoney Clover Lane Disney Princess Pouchette 03 Featured colorway: Disney Princess. 

 Inspired by the brand’s best-selling Pouchette Crossbody, the Large Pouchette is a multi-functional piece serving as a clutch, toiletry bag or organizational pouch within a larger purse.

 Stoney Clover Lane Bow Handle Crossbody Bag Featured colorway: The Castle Awaits. 

 Hold by the top handle or as a crossbody with the adjustable and removable strap.

 Related: Bath & Body Works Brings Back Fan-Favorite Disney Princess Collection With Fresh Fragrances
summary: Disney and Stoney Clover Lane are back with their fan-favorite partnership, including a fresh batch of limited-edition product.
